creator: olgeni@FreeBSD.org
text:
The postgresql-jdbc-8.3.603 port does not build with java/openjdk7
due to a missing condition in build.xml (it only covers java specification
version values up to 1.6).

The attached patch backports a fix from the most recent postgresql-jdbc.

Port maintainer (girgen@FreeBSD.org) is cc'd.

Generated with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.99
